Our Story

A Café Built for the Way You Actually Live

Basta! was born from a simple belief — that great food, honest coffee, and beautiful spaces shouldn't be saved for special occasions. We bring global brunch culture to Vadodara with an all-day menu that moves from morning pastries to evening mains, all under one warm, unhurried roof.

All-Day Dining
From 8 AM croissants to 10 PM pizzas — always open for you.
Specialty Coffee
Sourced beans, precise brews, crafted by people who care.
Global Flavors
Mediterranean, Asian, European — elevated and vegetarian-friendly.
Cozy-Modern Space
Designed to feel like your best-looking friend's apartment.
